facebook.caption:
Local RAG System for Business Documents: Implementation Guide

A practical guide for using local RAG with business documents: scope the files, set access rules, require source citations, and keep sensitive answers under review.

Read it: https://eb28.co/blog/local-rag-system-for-business-documents-a-plain-english-implementation-guide/

instagram.caption:
Local RAG should start smaller than most AI demos.

Pick one trusted document set. Set access rules. Require source citations. Keep human review in the workflow.

Read the full guide at eb28.co/blog/

shortFormVideo.hook: A local RAG system should not start with every company file.
shortFormVideo.brief: 15-25 second vertical video. Open with a messy folder/search scene, then three text beats: choose one document set, require source citations, review sensitive answers. End on the EB28 article title and project brief CTA.
